steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The pronoun replaces a plural antecedent — 'many historical newspapers' / 'these rare items.' The blank needs a plural object pronoun.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'it': singular object pronoun. Disagrees with the plural antecedent. ✗
  • Choice B — 'them': plural object pronoun. 'People around the world can access them' agrees with 'many historical newspapers.' ✓
  • Choice C — 'this': singular demonstrative. Same number error as A. ✗
  • Choice D — 'that': singular demonstrative. Also fails to match the plural antecedent. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
